summary: Iteration 108 - USSD 'Age cacaoyers' Bug Fix Testing COMPLETE. All 8 backend tests pass. Frontend USSD simulator verified working with full 14-question flow including age_cacaoyers=2 (the bug case). Bug fix confirmed: 'arbres_par_ha = total_trees / max(hectares, 0.01)' at line 217 in ussd.py resolves the 'Erreur' response issue.
critical_code_review_comments: ussd.py line 217: Fix correctly adds 'arbres_par_ha = total_trees / max(hectares, 0.01)' after total_trees calculation
ussd.py line 297-302: arbres_par_ha is used for REDD+ bonus calculation based on tree density thresholds (>=60, >=30, >=15)
ussd.py line 318: arbres_par_ha is included in the result dictionary returned to frontend
parse_answer() function correctly handles choice3 type for age_cacaoyers: maps '1'->jeune, '2'->mature, '3'->vieux
calculate_ussd_carbon_premium() uses max(hectares, 0.01) to prevent division by zero edge case
context_for_next_testing_agent: USSD 'Age cacaoyers' bug fix verified. The fix was a one-line addition at line 217 in ussd.py. All 3 USSD modes tested: (1) Stateless 14Q carbon calculator at /api/ussd/carbon-calculator, (2) Stateful simple 11Q estimation at /api/ussd/callback, (3) Stateful detailed 13Q estimation at /api/ussd/callback. Frontend USSD simulator at /farmer/prime-carbone works correctly. Cooperative dashboard USSD simulator button visible at /cooperative/dashboard.

backend_apis: POST /api/ussd/carbon-calculator with age_cacaoyers=1 (jeune) - PASSED: Returns valid prime result
POST /api/ussd/carbon-calculator with age_cacaoyers=2 (mature) - PASSED: THE BUG CASE - No longer returns 'Erreur'
POST /api/ussd/carbon-calculator with age_cacaoyers=3 (vieux) - PASSED: Returns valid prime result
POST /api/ussd/callback stateful simple estimation with age_cacaoyers=2 - PASSED: Full 11Q flow completes
POST /api/ussd/callback stateful detailed estimation with age_cacaoyers=3 - PASSED: Full 13Q flow completes
POST /api/ussd/calculate-premium public endpoint - PASSED: Returns arbres_par_ha in response
Edge case: Zero trees - PASSED: arbres_par_ha=0, no error
Edge case: Small hectares (0.1) - PASSED: No division by zero error
frontend_ui: /farmer/prime-carbone page loads with USSD phone simulator - PASSED
USSD session starts correctly showing Question 1/14 - PASSED
Full 14-question flow with age_cacaoyers=2 completes without error - PASSED
Final result shows Score, Niveau ARS, and improvement suggestions - PASSED
Cooperative dashboard /cooperative/dashboard loads with 'Simulateur USSD' button - PASSED

bug_fix_verification.bug_description: When user selected '2' (5-15 ans) for 'Age moyen de vos cacaoyers' question in USSD flow, it returned 'Erreur' instead of showing the carbon premium result
bug_fix_verification.root_cause: Variable 'arbres_par_ha' was referenced at lines 297 and 318 but never defined in calculate_ussd_carbon_premium() function
bug_fix_verification.fix_applied: Added 'arbres_par_ha = total_trees / max(hectares, 0.01)' at line 217 after total_trees calculation
bug_fix_verification.fix_verified: All 3 age_cacaoyers choices (1, 2, 3) now return valid prime results without errors
